_comment: Phase 3 test fixture. Three sessions covering the three time-of-expiry classes the session CRUD tests exercise. Timestamps are ISO-8601 UTC relative to a fixture anchor of 2026-04-22T12:00:00Z. Tests that need 'now-relative' expiries should either mock [DateTime]::UtcNow to the anchor date OR re-compute expiries at fixture-load time via a helper. Tokens are 64 hex chars (SESS-02 requirement) with a deterministic prefix followed by zero-padding so the test output is grep-friendly.
